headline: How Can Meta Stock Fall 30%?
summary: Meta Platforms (META) is currently riding a wave of massive ad revenue acceleration. As of early 2026, the company has reported advertising revenue growth in the 22% to 26% range, fueled by sophisticated AI-driven targeting and the aggressive monetization of Reels and WhatsApp. However, market leadership at this scale is difficult to maintain.

headline: What Justifies Broadcom's 50x Multiple?
summary: While Nvidia (NVDA) is hailed as the king of AI compute, Broadcom (AVGO) is quietly working its way to becoming the landlord of the AI era. Most investors look at the stock's 50x trailing multiple and believe that the stock is priced for a "perfection" it can't possibly sustain. (See AVGO valuation multiples.

headline: Meta’s Growing Role In Social Commerce Brings Fresh Regulatory Scrutiny
summary: U.S. attorneys general issue fresh warnings about investment scams using Meta Platforms' social networks, including deepfake driven schemes targeting retail users. The alerts coincide with NasdaqGS:META expanding AI powered advertising and rolling out a new PayPal partnership for one tap shopping and integrated payments. These developments draw new attention to Meta's role in financial safety, platform oversight, and its growing footprint in social commerce and transactions. For investors...

headline: Meta unveils first AI model from superintelligence team
summary: April 8 () - Meta Platforms on Wednesday unveiled Muse Spark, the first artificial intelligence model ‌from a team it assembled last year through ‌a costly talent war and sweeping internal restructuring to catch up ​with rivals in the AI race. tech giants are under pressure to prove their massive AI outlays will pay off.

headline: Meta unveils first AI model from costly superintelligence team
summary: Meta Platforms on Wednesday unveiled Muse Spark, the first artificial intelligence model from a costly team it  assembled last year to catch up with rivals in the ‌AI race.  Shares of the company extended gains to trade up nearly 7%.  The stakes are especially high for Meta after it hired Scale ​AI CEO Alex Wang last year under a $14.3 billion deal and offered some engineers pay packages of hundreds of millions of dollars to staff a new superintelligence team.

content.title: Meta unveils first AI model from costly superintelligence team
content.summary: Meta Platforms on Wednesday unveiled Muse Spark, the first artificial intelligence model from a costly team it  assembled last year to catch up with rivals in the ‌AI race.  Shares of the company extended gains to trade up nearly 7%.  The stakes are especially high for Meta after it hired Scale ​AI CEO Alex Wang last year under a $14.3 billion deal and offered some engineers pay packages of hundreds of millions of dollars to staff a new superintelligence team.
